name: Max Heart Rate Calculator
desc: Max Heart Rate Health Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_title: Max Heart Rate Health Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free max heart rate health calculator to quickly estimate fc_tanaka, fc_haskell based on edad. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate max HR for 30 year old.
result_context: The different fórmulas producen variaciones of 5-10 bpm; Tanaka es more precise to adultos mayores.
formula_display: Tanaka: FCmáx = 208 - 0.7 × edad; Haskell: FCmáx = 220 - edad
steps: Compara with fórmulas Arena and Gulati to mujeres
mistakes: Use solo formula 220-edad (desactualizada, sobreestima in mayores)
Entrenar siempre to the maximum (debe variar per zone of training)
Ignorar medicamentos que afectan frequency heart (betabloqueadores)
